STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JAN-02-1997, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), CONTINUED FROM THE 1/2/97 STAT CONF CALENDAR: ALSO AS TO WHY THERE IS NO ENTRY OF DEFAULT.
